title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 15 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 15 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 15 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/10/2025
The most-traded iron ore futures contract con nued to trade in the doldrums today, with the most-traded I2601 contract closing at 776.5, down 1.46%from the previous day. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell; steel mills purchased as needed, with some restocking at low levels, and inquiries were moderate. Market transac on senment remained moderate.
